action: Collect or ingest at least 5 ready real L2 days, 10 preferred, then rerun Phase96 and Phase94.
Patch p90_gap_ms first because event cadence affects all replay horizons and forward-fill/staleness assumptions.
Patch one_tick_return_std after timing because current synthetic one-tick volatility is too high relative to the real anchor.
Patch L1 imbalance and L1/L5 depth scales together so the book ladder remains internally consistent.
Keep median and p90 spread calibration within current passing gates while other patches are applied.
Only after Phase94 passes on multi-day anchors may a new strategy-family precommit be created.
